summary: Honest public README + variable-map refresh. Regenerated all 9 README screenshots from a windowed COHERONIA_SHOTS=1 capture tour (windowed because the capture uses RenderingServer.frame_post_draw, which blocks headless) so they render the now-live Codex art integration and adaptive audio instead of the pre-art placeholder swatches; every capture was visually reviewed before use, added the underground cave-darkness shot and surfaced the title screen showing the FQ-09U3 Music/Sound sliders. README corrections for honesty: 234/190 -> 257-check suite; removed the stale 'no audio' (the adaptive score, event stingers, and volume settings ship and were operator-approved by ear on 2026-07-10); reframed 'placeholder art' to the accurate image-first-with-fallback state (real generated art for the live categories, code-drawn fallback for the not-yet-authored gear overlays / opening cels / UI icons); the adaptive-score bullet now covers U3 stingers/ducking/volume/pause; the increment list reflects the full FQ-09R/S/V/C/W/A/M + U0-U3 arc. Added a 'Characters are data' section with real trait/role/body-rig excerpts from character_data.json and player_visuals.json (honest about 5 playable species vs 12 defined ancestries) and a concrete roadmap. VARIABLE_MATRIX re-audited against this run with new authority rows for event stingers+ducking, audio settings, player body art+rig, and Town Hall/world-anchor art. Docs/screenshots only - no code, data-schema, or smoke changes; the 257/257 suite stands.
scope: Documentation only: README.md, docs/VARIABLE_MATRIX.md, and docs/screenshots/*.png. No code, data, validation, or smoke changes.
next_action: FQ-10: more ores and metallurgy data. Art backlog via docs/ASSET_ROADMAP.md.
